personalizedMessages.subject: QuantXData MCP - Perfect for your crypto agents
personalizedMessages.bodyPlainText:
Hi John,

Saw your work on the trading agent repo. Impressive execution.

Noticed you're using CCXT for exchange data. QuantXData's MCP server gives you instant access to 123 exchanges without rate limits — perfect for autonomous agents.

Worth a quick look?

Best,
Arpit
